summary: Full backend smoke of 1 Darjeeling API against public URL. 23/23 checks passed. Seed is idempotent (27 items), auth (mock OTP + universal 123456 + invalid rejection + user reuse) works, JWT/me route correct, provider onboarding + role escalation to 'provider' works, Razorpay LIVE test order creation succeeds for both flows with correct paise amounts (9900 / 100), signature verify correctly rejects fake HMAC (400), listings CRUD/search/404 all correct, bookings + bookings/me correct, admin stats returns expected keys.
passed: POST /api/admin/seed idempotent; total_in_seed=27; second call inserted 0
GET /api/listings?type=spot returns 6 items with all required fields (id,title,type,description,location,price,image,tags)
GET /api/listings/{id} returns single listing; unknown id -> 404
POST /api/auth/otp/verify works with returned mock_otp AND universal '123456'; invalid '000000' -> 400
verify creates user first call and reuses same user id on second call for same phone
GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token returns user; without token -> 401
POST /api/providers/onboard creates provider with status='pending_payment' AND user role becomes 'provider'
GET /api/providers/me returns provider for logged-in user
POST /api/payments/order flow=provider_registration -> amount 9900 paise, real Razorpay order_ id, key_id=rzp_test_TBtLJY8UCCWL8B
POST /api/bookings creates booking with status='pending_payment'; unknown listing_id -> 404

notes.mocked: WhatsApp OTP delivery is MOCKED — mock_otp returned in response body; universal code '123456' always accepted.
notes.razorpay: Live Razorpay TEST keys used; order creation hits real Razorpay API and works; signature verify uses HMAC-SHA256 and correctly rejects invalid signature.
notes.test_credentials_file: /app/memory/test_credentials.md is present but empty — no persistent admin accounts documented; auth tests used mock OTP phones (+919999999999, +919888777666).
